event_info: starts off with a good length delivery around off; Tim Seifert knocks it into the off-side
short and wide outside off; Tim Seifert throws the hands at it; slapping it through covers to get going with a boundary. That's a good start to Tim Seifert's IPL 2026 campaign
pitched up by the bowler outside off; driven to wide mid-off for a single

ball_event: out Caught by Kagiso Rabada!! Ajinkya Rahane is gone for a golden duck! Mohammed Siraj goes full outside off
event_info: the ball swings away slightly and Ajinkya Rahane looks to heave across the line. Miscues it completely as he fails to get the timing right. The ball skies up in the air towards long-on; where Rabada completes a safe catch. The KKR captain departs without troubling the scorers. That's a perfect start for the Gujarat Titans. Ajinkya Rahane c Kagiso Rabada b Mohammed Siraj 0(1)
pitched up by the bowler outside off; shaping away from the batter; left alone

Angkrish Raghuvanshi is off the mark with a boundary as well. Fraction short outside off; Angkrish Raghuvanshi cuts it towards backward point on the bounce. Tewatia stationed there tries to grab it; but the ball flicks his fingers are races away to the fence. Looks like he has injured himself in his quest to grab that; he walks off the field along with the physio
ouch! Kagiso Rabada starts off with a short ball and Tim Seifert looks to fend it; ends up getting hit the body. Shows no signs off pain though
short and wide outside off; shaping away from the batter; Tim Seifert throws his hands at it; doesn't middle it though
short and punished! Picks the length early; rocks back and pulls it over deep mid-wicket for a towering six. That's the first maximum of the evening
drifting on the pads; Tim Seifert clips it towards mid-wicket for a single
width on offer outside off; Angkrish Raghuvanshi throws the kitchen sink at it; gets an outside edge that beats Siraj who sprinting across at third man
fired down the leg-side; Angkrish Raghuvanshi tries to flick it away and misses

ball_event: out Caught by Jos Buttler!! The two in-form batters are gone. Back of a length delivery outisde off
event_info: shaping away from the batter; Angkrish Raghuvanshi has a poke at it and the outside edge has been taken by the keeper. Two early wickets for Gujarat Titans; they wouldn't have asked for a better start. Angkrish Raghuvanshi c Jos Buttler b Kagiso Rabada 8(4) [4s-2]
pitched up by the bowler outside off; shaping away from the batter; Tim Seifert goes for a drive and misses
back of a length around off; Tim Seifert plays it on the rise; knocks it towards the off-side
back of a length outside off; Tim Seifert punches it towards wide mid-off and scampers across to the other end. The throw came Buttler's end; but he took off the bails without the ball in his hands
on a length outside off; shaping away from the batter; Cameron Green goes for a drive and misses

Cameron Green shows some intent. He advances down the wicket and slashes away from his body; gets an outside edge to square third man. Ashok Sharma in the deep charges across to his right and stops it
back of a length outside off; Cameron Green steers it towards backward point where the fielder grabs it with a dive to his left. A throw at the bowler's end; but the non-striker comes back in

in the air; but in the gap! Back of a length outside off; shaping away from the batter; Tim Seifert plays it on the rise; was in the air for a bit; but through the gap at covers for four more. Tim Seifert is playing with a positive mindset
nudged towards mid-on by Tim Seifert for one
1 run; sliding down the leg-side; Cameron Green looks to clip it away; flicks his pads and rolls towards the on-side. They take a leg bye

on the bounce to the fielder at third man. Was a length delivery outside off; Tim Seifert swings hard and the outside edge flies to third man. Lands just in front of the fielder charging in from the edge of the boundary
good length delivery outside off; shaping away from the batter; Cameron Green plays away from his body as the outside edge flies towards third man

ball_event: out Caught by Glenn Phillips!! Another one bites the dust. KKR have lost their third wicket in the powerplay. Rabada punches his first in the air. He likes it. Short and wide outside off
event_info: Tim Seifert cuts it towards point and Phillips takes a safe catch inside the circle. He didn't have to move an inch. An easy catch for Phillips' standards. Things going from bad to worse for the Knight Riders. Powell has walked in to bat inside the powerplay. Tim Seifert c Glenn Phillips b Kagiso Rabada 19(14) [4s-2 6s-1]
short of a length outside off; sliced through point on the bounce
tad short outside off; shaping away from the batter; Rovman Powell gets squared up on the defence; gets beaten on the outside edge
nips away from the batter; Rovman Powell steers it towards third man for one

the decision has to be reversed! Was a short and quick ball on leg; Cameron Green goes for a pull and gets beaten on the top edge. UltraEdge confirms there was no bat involved; hence Green survives. That ball moved away slightly; hence the umpire probably misjudged it for an edge
good length delivery that nips back in; Cameron Green looks to carve it away; gets beaten on the inside edge
fraction short outside off; Cameron Green cuts it through the off-side for a brace
appeal for an lbw; but this was sliding down the leg-side! Good length delivery on leg; skids along the deck and strikes the batter on the pads. Easily drifting down the leg-side
145.8kph; back of a length outside off; Rovman Powell attempts a cut and misses
tad short outside off; Rovman Powell runs it down to third man for a single
back of a length outside off; Cameron Green steers it towards backward point
lovely bowling by Kagiso Rabada. Good length delivery outside off; Cameron Green looks to play it on the rise; gets beaten due to the pace and bounce
length delivery at the stumps; Cameron Green knocks it down the pitch
starts off with a length delivery outside off; hint of movement as Rovman Powell chips it on the bounce towards deep cover-point
fired down the leg-side; Cameron Green looks to glance it away; but fails to make contact
back of a length outside off; shaping away from the batter; Cameron Green carves it through point for one

appeal for an lbw; turned down! On a length around leg; nips back slightly as Rovman Powell gets hit on the pads. The impact was pretty high though as it was sliding down the leg-side as well. Good call to not opt for a review
directed at the stumps; knocked back to the bowler by Rovman Powell

that was high and handsome! On a length around middle and leg; nips back in as Rovman Powell lofts it cleanly over long-on. Goes miles up in the air and clears the boundary at long-on. 84m maximum for Powell
on a length around middle and leg; clipped through the on-side by Rovman Powell for a couple of runs
starts off with a back of a length delivery; Cameron Green plays it on the rise; knocking it towards cover for a quick run
147.2kph; good length delivery around off; punched crisply to covers. At athletic save by Phillips
short of a length around off; Rovman Powell looks to drag across the line; gets an inside edge onto the pads

that was delivered at 147kph; and Rovman Powell has managed to deposit it into the stands! Ashok Sharma goes short and quick; Rovman Powell gets into a good position and pummels the pull over deep mid-wicket for a towering six
more runs for Rovman Powell! Fraction short outside off; Rovman Powell carves it through backward point for a rollicking boundary once again
143.4kph; banged in short ball outside off; Rovman Powell plays it on the rise; steering it towards backward point

in the air; but safe! Banged in short by Prasidh Krishna; Cameron Green rocks back in the crease and pulls it towards deep mid-wicket. On the bounce and over the boundary. Would have been a catch; had there been a fielder at deep mid-wicket

full and quick on leg; Cameron Green looks to flick it away; gets hit on the pads. They appeal for an lbw; but the umpire turns it down. Was a close call that. Looked out for a moment; but there was an inside edge; confirm replays
short of a length around off; steered towards backward point
good length delivery outside off; lofted over the infield at cover-point
full length delivery around middle and leg; Cameron Green flicks it through square leg for a brace
full toss on the pads; Cameron Green flicks it through mid-wicket for a couple of runs
greets Rashid Khan with a boundary! This was on the fuller side and Rovman Powell lapped it towards the fine leg boundary. No fielder in the deep and those are four runs
laps towards fine leg for a single
that's a googly by Rashid Khan; keeps really low as Cameron Green nudges it towards mid-wicket
yet another googly; but it's down the leg-side again
flatter through the air around off; Cameron Green knocks it down the pitch

loopy delivery by Rashid Khan; dips in front of Cameron Green who goes down on his knee and sweeps it away to the deep square leg fence. There was a fielder sprinting across in the deep who tried to stop it; but couldn't do so
a googly to end the over; Cameron Green swings across the line; gets an inside edge towards fine leg
yorker length ball at the stumps; Cameron Green squeezes it down the pitch
attempts a slower one; but goes way too wide outside off. This has landed outside the pitch. It's a no ball; and there will be a free-hit coming up!
short and quick outside off; 143.7kph; Cameron Green goes for a pull and misses. Nothing off the free-hit

50-run stand up! How did that miss the stumps? Would have crashed into the stumps; some other day. On a length around middle and leg; Cameron Green swings early and the inside edge misses the leg stump and races away to the boundary
short and quick around off; Cameron Green swings and misses
slower one outside off; Cameron Green slashes hard at it; plays it away from his body as the outside edge flies over backward point for a single
banged in short by Ashok Sharma outside off; Rovman Powell sways away from it

ball_event: out Caught by Mohammed Siraj!! From 146kph
event_info: to 107kph. That's a well disguised slower one by Ashok Sharma. Rovman Powell completely fails to read the slower one; he swings across the line; gets a thick top edge and Siraj at long-on holds onto a well-judged catch. The ball went miles up in the air; so it was a pretty good effort by the fielder in the deep. End of a handy cameo by Rovman Powell comes to an end. Rovman Powell c Mohammed Siraj b Ashok Sharma 27(20) [4s-2 6s-2]

1 run; not out it is! Was a leg-break by Rashid Khan and Cameron Green got rapped on the pads after missing out on the sweep shot. Replays confirm it was pitching outside off and the impact was outside off as well. Just a leg bye for Green and GT lose a review
flatter through the air outside off; Anukul Roy taps it into the off-side
nicely timed shot. Rashid Khan goes full outside off; was a googly and Anukul Roy picked it pretty well. Goes inside-out and lofts it over extra cover for a well executed boundary
on the fuller side as Anukul Roy squeezes it towards long-on for one
that's launched over long-on! Cameron Green puts on his dancing shoes and smokes it over long-on for a towering six. That went miles up in the air; was a clean strike

more runs! This was on the shorter side; Cameron Green rocks back in the crease and pulls it away to the deep mid-wicket fence to end the over with a boundary. Was an expensive over by the leggie. He concedes 16 runs in it
back of a length outside off; Anukul Roy steers it through backward point for a couple of runs

yes-no between the two batters and they take a single eventually. Anukul Roy nudged it back to the bowler and Ashok Sharma got his left to it; parrying it towards the fielder on the leg-side. A single taken
that's more like it. Pitched up by the bowler around middle and leg; Cameron Green picks the bones out of it; flicking it over deep square leg for another maximum

that looked like a certain wide and the umpire's decision has to be overturned. Was a short ball outside off and Cameron Green got beaten as he tried to play it. Was above his head and that shall be a wide ball
another huge six. Cameron Green advances down the wicket and swings this over wide long-on for half-a-dozen. Another excellent shot. Slowly getting into his groove is the lanky batsman
fifty for Cameron Green! Slower delivery on the pads; Cameron Green flicks it through the leg-side for a brace to bring up the milestone. Gets a round of applause from his teammates in the dugout
back of a length around middle and leg; Cameron Green heaves it through mid-wicket for a single
smoked into the stands! On the shorter side; Cameron Green rocks back in the crease and pulls it over deep mid-wicket for six more. Rashid Khan is proving to be expensive tonight

streaky! An outside-edge saved Green there. He comes down the track; gets deceived in flight; the ball dips in front of him and turns; takes the edge and flies past Jos Buttler. The deviation was big enough to take it past Buttler

dropped! Green is living on the edge. This was a sitter and Washington has put it down. How costly is it going to be? Green sits down; mistimes the slog sweep and hits it towards deep mid-wicket. Washington runs to his left; gets both hands but does not hang on. To make matters worse the ball trickles into the rope
flighted delivery on off; Green goes hard on the sweep and ekes out an inside-edge onto the pad
very full delivery around off; Green jams it into the ground and the ball bounces over Rashid; the duo scamper back for the second
fuller and at the stumps; Green drags the sweep to deep mid-wicket and retains strike
full pitcher around off; Green drives it down to long-on
back of a length around off; Anukul stays leg-side and steers it to third man
that's a gift and a red-hot Green is not missing out. 143ks full toss around knee-height; Green does not quite middle the heave; but gets it in the gap between long-on and deep mid-wicket
145.8ks sprays it down leg; Green can't lay bat on the glance and it is called a wide
low full toss on off; Green clears his front leg and whips it to deep mid-wicket

ball_event: out Caught by Jos Buttler!! Prasidh strikes! He has this habit of picking wickets in the middle overs and this is a much needed one for GT. They would have wanted Green
event_info: but will be fine seeing the back of Anukul. Back of a length delivery; angled across the left-hander; Anukul stays rooted to the crease and looks to drive through the line; gets a thin outside-edge and Buttler does the rest behind the stumps. Anukul Roy c Jos Buttler b Prasidh Krishna 9(7) [4s-1]
full and angled across; Rinku slices it towards sweeper cover and gets off the mark

ball_event: out Caught by Jos Buttler!! Rabada returns and strikes! Rinku's poor season extends to one more game. This is almost a repeat of Anukul's dismissal. Back of a length delivery
event_info: angled across the southpaw; Rinku stays leg-side and tries to loft it over the off-side; the ball kisses the outside-edge and another simple catch for Buttler. Third wicket for Rabada and he's been top class today. Rinku Singh c Jos Buttler b Kagiso Rabada 1(2)
139.1ks back of a length angled in; Ramandeep closes the bat face and the leading edge rolls to cover
that's a gimme and Ramandeep does not miss out. Short of length delivery; angling down leg; Ramandeep gets inside the line and uses the pace of Rabada; helps the pull all the way over fine leg
back of a length close to off; Ramandeep tucks it straight to mid-wicket
142.1ks fuller in length; but slanting in; Ramandeep moves across and clips it past mid-wicket; easy couple
143.2ks back of a length around off; Ramandeep shuffles and ekes out an inside-edge onto the thigh pad; the ball lobs towards square leg and the pair cross over
this is a good start from Ramandeep. 144.8ks short of length outside off; he walks across and then arches his back to get under the cut shot; sends it up and over backward point; almost all the way

bit streaky but another boundary for Ramandeep. Short ball aimed for the body; he moves inside the line and plays the pull; gets more of a top-edge and there's a deflection off the helmet; the ball flies wide of Buttler

ball_event: out Caught by Mohammed Siraj!! Ashok Sharma has his man. KKR losing their way towards the end. Ramandeep had got a couple of fours but he perishes looking for a six. The slower ball from Ashok
event_info: 105.9ks and Ramandeep is completly deceived; he's through his heave early and miscues it towards wide long-on. Siraj settles under and reverse cups it safely. KKR are 7 down and still 21 balls left in the innings. Ramandeep Singh c Mohammed Siraj b Ashok Sharma 17(8) [4s-2 6s-1]
146.8ks short of length at the stumps; Narine stays leg-side and has a waft; the ball flies past the top-edge
150ks full and angled across; close to yorker length and Narine is late on the drive; the ball flies past his outside-edge
144.8ks short of length outside off; Narine stays leg-side and has a slash; doesn't connect again
full and at the stumps; Green flicks backward of square leg
140.8ks short of length delivery; Narine sways away and lets it pass

ball_event: out Caught by Glenn Phillips!! The wheels are coming off. Wickets are tumbling and Green is stranded on the other end. 138.2ks full and angled across
event_info: because Narine has cleared his front leg and standing on leg-stump; he has to reach for the big shot; slices it over backward point and it is that man - Phillips - who is under the ball. He runs to his left from short third; keeps his eyes on the ball and takes it with both hands. That was not an easy catch for nomral people; but easy for Phillips. Sunil Narine c Glenn Phillips b Mohammed Siraj 0(5)
fullish delivery around off; Kartik eases it back to Siraj
there comes the short ball; right on off-stump; Kartik is late to spot it but manages to duck down and evade it

that's an incredible shot. Somewhat ruins Siraj's over and figures. Short ball banged into the surface; Kartik takes it on and swats the pull in front of square. No one at deep mid-wicket and the ball sails over..
full and angling in; Green clips it backward of square and takes the single. Exposes Kartik for 5 balls..

ball_event: out Kartik Tyagi Run Out!! Green tries to get back on strike but had not communicated it with Kartik. He throws him under the bus. Yorker around leg-stump
event_info: Kartik clears his front leg and the ball nutmegs him on the way to Buttler. Green is off and next to him when Kartik decides to go for the run. Buttler throws the ball to Prasidh and he does the rest. Kartik is nowhere close to making his crease. Why did he take the single off the first ball then? Kartik Tyagi run out (Jos Buttler/Prasidh Krishna) 6(4) [6s-1]
full and slanted into the pads; Green ekes out an inside-edge onto the pad and the ball rolls to short fine
charges down and yorks himself; jams it off the inside-edge and the ball goes straight to short fine
in the air and safe. Full toss at the stumps; Green had premeditated the scoop - moves across and bends down to play the shot; gets it high on the bat and the ball lands in front of Buttler
146.1ks low full toss around off; Green drills it to long-on and retains strike
flatter; quicker and outside off; Green tries the reverse sweep and misses
no flight and pushing it through; Green looks to go down the ground and misses
fired full and at the stumps; Green drills it to long-on and races across; he wanted two but it was not on
1 run; googly that turns in; Arora misses the tuck and the ball deflects off the thigh pad

FOUR; that's a missed stumping. Jos Buttler puts his head down and stays like that for a while. Green comes down the track; misses a full toss and the ball bounces in the crease; Buttler does not glove it cleanly and Green gets away with it

ball_event: out Caught by Jos Buttler!! Rashid trumps the last over battle. Just the 6 runs and 5 of them were extras. He also picks the wicket of Green. Quicker and fraction short
event_info: there was width on offer and Green went for the cut; gets a thin outside-edge and Buttler makes no mistake this time. Cameron Green c Jos Buttler b Rashid Khan 79(55) [4s-7 6s-4]
1 run; swing for Vaibhav Arora but it's sliding down leg; Sai Sudharsan flicks and misses; easily missing leg-stump and they take a legbye
full outside off; shapes away; left alone
full and angling into the right-hander; Shubman Gill gets forward and flicks in the air; wide of mid-wicket
full and shapes back in; towards off; Shubman Gill gets forward and thrashes it on the rise; the drive and it races away wide of cover and mid-off. That was a statement shot
sliding down leg. It's on a length and Shubman Gill flicks nicely; wide of deep backward square-leg and the fielder does well to keep it to one
short of length and down leg; Sai Sudharsan goes on the back foot and tucks to deep backward square-leg. One more and that's a good start for GT
low full-toss and Sai Sudharsan gets forward to drive; back to Kartik Tyagi; who gets a right hand and deflects it to mid-on
tight back of a length delivery and middle; Sai Sudharsan goes on the back foot and defends to mid-off. That hit the bat hard
full on middle; Sai Sudharsan gets forward to flick and it's wide of mid-wicket. It's an easy three. Narine chases and keeps it down to three
full outside off; Shubman Gill gets forward and drives it so hard; but straight to the fielder at cover. That was creamed; either side would've been four
Shubman Gill is on fire here. It's a wide length delivery outside off; that's stand and delivery; was in the air but the drive goes well wide of mid-off and cover. Right into the gap

Shubman Gill is playing some gems tonight. This is the best of the lot. And look at him hold the pose. Full on off; was there to be off-driven and Gill has spanked the pants off that drive. High elbow and it's past Kartik Tyagi's left hand in a flash
full on leg-stump; Sai Sudharsan gets forward to flick to deep mid-wicket
Shubman Gill is in the mood. He comes down the track and takes it on a length; lofts over extra-cover. It's all the way. That's was sweet timing
full on middle; Shubman Gill gets forward to drive to long-off
full down leg; Sai Sudharsan sweeps aerially and it's all the way over deep backward square-leg. That was there to be hit and Sudharsan didn't miss
flat good length outside off; Sai Sudharsan reaches for it and cuts; mistimes it to point
full on middle; Sai Sudharsan gets forward and flicks; all the way over deep mid-wicket. Didn't hold back. A big over. 20 runs off it
on a length outside off; Shubman Gill gets forward to push to long-on
tossed up full on middle; Sai Sudharsan gets forward to push to point
short of length on middle; Sai Sudharsan goes on the back foot and pulls; beats the run and dive of deep mid-wicket. That was in the gap. Runs continue to bleed for KKR
this turns into leg-stump; on the pad. On a good length and turns in; Sai Sudharsan goes on the back foot to turn; misses; rapped on the pads; but sliding down
flat good length on off; hint of turn away; Sai Sudharsan goes on the back foot and cuts straight to the fielder to extra-cover. That was hit hard
another delivery that turns into the pads; Sai Sudharsan goes on the back foot and turns it to square-leg; straight to the fielder
short of length on middle; the leg-cutter; Shubman Gill comes down the track and makes room to cut; flies over the middle-stump. That moved away with extra bounce
slower-ball off-cutter and in the slot on off. Shubman Gill gets forward and lofts straight down the ground. A powerful blow and it's all the way
short of length and following Shubman Gill outside the leg-stump; he short-arm jabs the pull to deep mid-wicket
short of length outside off; Sai Sudharsan goes on the back foot and pulls; Vaibhav Arora stretches his outstretched right hand; deflects it to mid-off

short of length and down leg; Shubman Gill tries to pull; off the thick inside-edge and on to thigh pad. It falls just in front of the forward-diving Kartik Tyagi at short fine. Rahane wanted that to be taken. Was the slower-ball and dug in
short of length and on middle; Shubman Gill goes on the back foot and pulls hard; wide of short fine; and it races away to the deep backward square-leg fence; Gill ends the over with a four

ball_event: out Caught by Kartik Tyagi!! There's the first wicket. Down leg
event_info: on a length; Sai Sudharsan tries to help it on its way; the top-edge is found and it's a simple catch to short fine. Tyagi takes it easily. Respite for KKR. Sai Sudharsan c Kartik Tyagi b Sunil Narine 22(16) [4s-1 6s-2]
full outside off and Jos Buttler accepts the invitation. He gets forward and lofts over cover and there's no protection in the deep. Gets off the mark in style
a slip in and this is a short of length and turns into off; Jos Buttler goes on the back foot and cuts to cover; straight to the fielder
tossed up on off; Jos Buttler gets forward and lofts through the line; clean strike and it flies all the way over long-off. Mid-off was inside anyway
flat length delivery on off; Jos Buttler goes on the back foot and pushes it to cover. That moved away off the pitch

Sunil Narine has his hands on his head. This is a flat off-break and turns into off; Jos Buttler with feet cemented; pushes and the thick inside-edge almost grazes leg-stump. Runs away and luck for Buttler. GT with a fine powerplay
full on middle; Shubman Gill gets forward to flick to long-on
flat good length and down leg; Jos Buttler goes on the back foot and tucks to deep backward square-leg
tossed up full and Shubman Gill has played a beauty. He gets forward and lofts over extra-cover. So easy; just a stride forward and then puts it away
flat back of a length on middle; Shubman Gill goes on the back foot and nudges to deep mid-wicket
good length and flat on leg-stump; Jos Buttler goes on the back foot and nudges a single to deep mid-wicket
flat good length and wide outside off; Shubman Gill reaches for it and glides it with an open-face; wide of backward point and short third man; runs away for another four

full and in the slot on off; that's a gift for Jos Buttler. He gets forward and even though he loses his bottom-hand he lofts all the way straight down the ground. Shubman Gill likes it as he comes to punch gloves with Buttler
quicker and sliding down leg; good length and Jos Buttler goes on the back foot to turn and misses; rapped on the thigh pad
fast delivery and seam-up; on off; Jos Buttler goes on the back foot and pushes it wide of cover
flat good length and no turn on middle; Shubman Gill goes on the back foot and turns it to the vacant mid-wicket area
flat good length on middle; Jos Buttler goes on the back foot and nudges it to deep mid-wicket
fullish on off; again no turn; Shubman Gill gets forward to push to long-on; played with a full-face

full outside off; Shubman Gill gets forward and laces the cover drive and that came off the full-face; Rahane dives to his right and cuts it off at cover. Gill is livid with himself for not finding the gap
short of length just outside off; Shubman Gill goes on the back foot and taps it to backward point; off the open-face
short of length outside off; Shubman Gill goes on the back foot and short-arm jabs the pull; straight to the fielder at deep mid-wicket
short of length and middle; Jos Buttler goes on the back foot and nudges it to short mid-wicket
that's a good short delivery. At Jos Buttler's right shoulder; he is rushed and misses the pull; flicks the shoulder and falls in front of Tim Seifert
short of length and wide outside off; gets forward and lofts; doesn't time it; with an open-face to sweeper cover

ball_event: out Caught by Cameron Green!! Varun Chakaravarthy gets Jos Buttler again. 7th time he has got him in 11 times in T20s. Buttler shadow-practices the swing as he departs. The change of angle works
event_info: Chakaravarthy came round the wicket and it's full on off; was in the slot; but Buttler gets forward to loft and miscues it; simple catch to long-on. Green gets forward to take it with two hands. Jos Buttler c Cameron Green b Varun Chakaravarthy 25(15) [4s-2 6s-2]
on a length outside off; Washington Sundar goes on the back foot to push; the open-face is found; finds short third man
on a length on middle and leg; Washington Sundar closes the face of the bat and tucks it through mid-wicket and gets off the mark
quicker on off; good length and Shubman Gill gets forward to push it with an open-face; wide of backward point; to his right
flat good length outside off; Washington Sundar goes on the back foot and punches it down to long-on
turns into middle; good length and Shubman Gill gets forward to close the face and nurdle it to short fine

50 for Shubman Gill. He raises his bat and gives the thumbs up. His Bradmanesque record here at the Narendra Modi Stadium continues. Gets there with a flick to a full delivery on middle; finds deep mid-wicket
this turns away; on a good length; Washington Sundar goes on the back foot and taps it back to Sunil Narine
short of length and outside off; Washington Sundar goes on the back foot and cuts hard and late; finds deep backward point. Just one as the fielder did well
full on off; Shubman Gill gets forward and flicks wide of long-on; easy two
flat good length on off; Shubman Gill leans back and cuts from the stump; but picks out backward point
no turn on this good length delivery on middle; Shubman Gill goes on the back foot and tucks to deep mid-wicket
Shubman Gill steps out and this is a quicker delivery on middle; length; Shubman Gill turns it wide of deep mid-wicket and comes back for the 2nd
full on middle; Shubman Gill backs away and drives inside-out; wide of long-off and it's an easy two
no chance for Anukul at backward point. It's a flat good length delivery outside off; Shubman Gill leans back; slices the cut; it has enough to clear the leap of Anukul and it runs away
tossed up full on off; turns in; Shubman Gill gets forward to push to the left of short mid-wicket

flighted delivery outside off; in the slot again; full; Shubman Gill gets forward and lofts through the line; towards the sightscreen and it's all the way. Gill watched the flight of the ball after he hit that
flat good length outside off; Shubman Gill goes on the back foot and cuts to deep point
tossed up full and a hint of turn away but Shubman Gill is down the pitch and to the ball; shows the full face of the bat and drives it to long-off
good length and flat on middle; Washington Sundar goes on the back foot and punches it down to long-on
no turn; good length and flat on middle; Shubman Gill goes on the back foot and punches it down to long-on
flat good length just outside off; Washington Sundar and punches it down to long-off
flat good length on off; Shubman Gill gets forward and drives it back to Sunil Narine; good stop and Narine saves a single
full outside off; Shubman Gill gets forward to drive to cover; straight to the fielder
full on leg-stump; Washington Sundar gets forward to flick wide of deep mid-wicket; easy two
1 run; short of length and down leg; Washington Sundar tries to help it away; misses; off the thigh pad and down to fine-leg

wow. That is a serious shot. Rahane has an arm around Kartik Tyagi's shoulder and a chat. It's a short of length delivery on off; Shubman Gill gets forward and pulls from there; it flies 80m into the crowd at deep square-leg. Big smile on Gill's face as he punches gloves with Washington Sundar
slower-ball off-cutter and short of length just outside off; Shubman Gill goes on the back foot and pulls hard and wide of deep mid-wicket for one. Rinku does well
gloved wide of Seifert and beats him to his right. A short delivery at the body; but Washington Sundar gets inside the line and pulls; off the glove and well wide of Seifert
this is short and down leg; Washington Sundar tries to help the pull on its way; but misses; called a wide. That flew to Seifert
slower-ball off-cutter and on a good length on middle; Washington Sundar gets forward and whips it to deep mid-wicket
short and dragged down on middle; Washington Sundar goes on the back foot and pulls wide of deep mid-wicket. Again Rinku does well
flat good length and down leg; Shubman Gill closes the face of the bat and flicks to deep backward square-leg

ball_event: out Caught by Kartik Tyagi!! Helped straight to the fielder at deep backward square-leg. It's a length delivery on middle and leg
event_info: was there for the short-arm jab; Washington Sundar finds Kartik near the fence. He bends down low and takes it well. No celebrations from Varun Chakaravarthy. Sundar c Kartik Tyagi b Varun Chakaravarthy 13(13) [4s-1]
flat good length on middle; turns in a hint; Glenn Phillips goes on the back foot and tucks it to deep backward square-leg; is off the mark
length and outside the leg-stump; Shubman Gill nudges it to deep backward square-leg and retains the strike with that run
short of length and quick on middle; Glenn Phillips goes on the back foot and nurdles it down to deep backward square-leg
tossed up full on off; Glenn Phillips gets forward to flick to mid-wicket. Sort of a thick inside-edge
full and down leg; Glenn Phillips sweeps and misses. An appeal from Seifert but that was more to distract the ump
flat good length on off; Glenn Phillips goes on the back foot and punches it to the right of Anukul Roy; who dives and cuts it off
flat good length on leg-stump; Glenn Phillips goes on the back foot and tucks it wide of mid-wicket for one
Shubman Gill comes down the track and flicks it to deep mid-wicket; was a length delivery on the stumps
flat good length on middle; Glenn Phillips goes on the back foot to push; off the thick outer half of the bat; wide of cover
flat good length on middle; Shubman Gill goes on the back foot and turns it to the vacant mid-wicket area
full and wide outside off from round the wicket; was in the slot; Shubman Gill leans back to loft and misses

full and wide outside off; Shubman Gill gets forward and lofts; it's a tough stop for Rinku at deep extra-cover. He runs and stretches his right hand; the ball falls in front of Rinku; he can't stop it
full outside off; Shubman Gill gets forward to loft; slices it and it drops short of Rinku running in
full and wide outside off; Glenn Phillips reaches for it and slices it; wide of Green at deep backward point. Two more
full on middle; Glenn Phillips gets forward to flick wide of mid-on. Anukul runs and slides to his right to keep it to one
way outside off; full; past the tramline; left alone and wide taken

ball_event: out Caught by Cameron Green!! What a catch that is. The big man Green from deep backward point. This is full and wide outside off
event_info: Shubman Gill slices the loft; off the open-face. It's dropping on Green who runs in and takes it with two hands as he tumbles. He then throws the ball away in delight. No 100 for Gill who richly deserved one. He batted on another level. KKR still in this after that wicket. The ploy to bowl full and wide outside off has worked for Vaibhav Arora. Shubman Gill c Cameron Green b Vaibhav Arora 86(50) [4s-8 6s-4];
length on off; Glenn Phillips gets forward to drive it down to long-off
length ball on off; Tewatia mistimes the drive wide of mid-off
full and in the slot; Glenn Phillips gets forward and lofts straight. Easily beats long-on to his left. That raced off the bat. Important boundary and releases the presure

four more. It's a slower-ball and short at Glenn Phillips; he goes on the back foot and helps the pull. Hit the ball on top of its head; wide of short fine and no chance for deep backward square-leg to his right
short of length on middle; Glenn Phillips goes on the back foot to short-arm jab; the thick inside-edge hits the thigh pad and runs away to deep backward square-leg
slower-ball off-cutter and wide outside off; Rahul Tewatia goes on the back foot and cuts to deep point

full and angling into the left-hander on middle; Rahul Tewatia gets forward and flicks well; Tyagi runs and dives to his left at deep backward square-leg but the ball wins. Slips under the body and touches the cushions. They are checking if it did touch the cushion. Narine helping out Tyagi near the fence. Still checking they are. Tyagi pushed the cushions when he fell. Given as two. It took a long while but they finally come to a conclusion
low full-toss on middle; Rahul Tewatia gets forward to flick and finds deep backward square-leg

good yorker length delivery and angling away from the right-hander outside off; Glenn Phillips tries to dig it out; to the right of Vaibhav Arora who fumbles; but there's backup as mid-wicket is close-by
yorker length on middle; Glenn Phillips gets forward to flick to deep mid-wicket; just one
short and at Rahul Tewatia; he is rushed; splices the pull; rolls in front of long-on and again it's just one
full and wide outside off; Glenn Phillips gets forward to drive and it's straight to the fielder at deep extra-cover. Just one
way outside off; past the tramline; length delivery and left alone. Rahane claps in appreciation. That's a wide

ball_event: out Caught by Rinku Singh!! Hello! Hello! What do we have here? Ramandeep Singh with a double fist-pump. He roars. It's a short delivery outside off
event_info: gets big on Glenn Phillips; he fetches the pull and miscues; easy catch for Rinku at deep mid-wicket who is in from the fence by quite a way. He won't drop it and kisses the ball in his trademark celebration. KKR - can they pull it off? Glenn Phillips c Rinku Singh b Ramandeep Singh 19(16) [4s-2]
short outside off; Shahrukh Khan initally wanted to pull; then realises the line and opens the face of the bat to dab to deep backward point. Sensible batting
full on middle; was the slower-ball off-cutter and Rahul Tewatia is early into the flick; the leading-edge rolls in front of extra-cover. Who is on the edge of the ring. Easy single

GT win. A slower-ball off-cutter and well wide outside off; Shahrukh Khan reaches for it and flat-bats it; the ball is travelling and Powell shows off his athletic skills; runs and dives to his left at long-off and in one motion gets up and throws it back. But it always was an easy two and that's enough
